properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v4 v8 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13 v9 v14

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Up early in the mornin' When I hear the birds singin' It sounds like freedom You been good to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Even late in the evenin' When the day is endin' I'll still be singin' You been good to me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, oh, oh Glory Hallelujah I came runnin' when He set me free God's been good to me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh, oh, oh Glory Hallelujah I was blind but now my eyes can see God's been good to me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Got a testimony Your redemption story Go run and tell it You been good to me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Got a testimony Your redemption story Go run and tell it He's been good to me

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh, oh, oh Glory Hallelujah I came runnin' when he set me free God's been good to me

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Oh, oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh God's been good to me

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Ain't no chain gonna shackle me (I'm free, I'm free indeed) Ain't no rock cryin' out for me (I'm free, I'm free indeed) Ain't no storm gonna steal my peace (I'm free, I'm free indeed) 'Cause when the sun sets free, it's free indeed (I'm free, I'm free indeed)

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Oh, oh, oh Glory Hallelujah (c'mon) I came runnin' when he set me free (when he set me free, oh) God's been good to me

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Oh oh oh Glory Hallelujah I was blind but now my eyes can see (yeah, yeah) God's been good to me Raise to Him now

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Oh, oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh (ayy) God's been good to me

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Oh, oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh God's been good to me (whoo!)

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: Tell me who can stand before us When we call on that great name? Jesus, Jesus, precious Jesus We have the victory
